text:

  FreeBSD src repository

  Modified files:

  Log:
  SVN rev 179710 on 2008-06-10 18:47:43Z by jhb
  
  Use sysctl to fetch stats from the kernel instead of reading variables
  directly via libkvm.

  Tested by:      Danny Braniss  danny cs.huji.ac.il
  MFC after:      1 week
